template.public_message: I am interested in the AI Agent Income Field Manual or fixed USD 10 micro-audit. Public-safe question or buyer context goes here.

curl_example: curl -X POST http://43.129.246.70/api/public-lead -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"visitor_type\":\"human\",\"message_type\":\"buyer_lead\",\"public_message\":\"I am interested in the AI Agent Income Field Manual. Please confirm the safest public order flow.\",\"public_url\":\"http://43.129.246.70/buy-field-manual-now.html\",\"contact_present\":false,\"no_private_data_confirmed\":true}"

income_gate.rule: A buyer intent lead is not income. Count only after payment or another paid_or_usable_value is actually received and verified.

privacy_boundary: Do not include payment card data, PayPal account details, KYC/tax files, IDs, private screenshots, passwords, OTPs, wallet secrets, claim codes, full address, private phone, or private account text.
